regional_cost_note: Excavation in Gisborne typically costs $185–$230/hr with operator, $38–$70/m³ disposed for a site cut, and $900–$3,500 for foundation excavation. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. Confirm spoil disposal is included — tipping fees and cartage can add significantly to the cost.
